credentials.name: Google Search Console OAuth
credentials.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication for Google Search Console API
credentials.instructions:
1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com
2. Create a project (or select existing)
3. Enable the Google Search Console API (APIs & Services → Library)
4. Create OAuth 2.0 credentials (APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth client ID)
   - Application type: Web application
   - Authorized redirect URI: http://localhost:3777/api/skills/google-search-console/oauth2/callback
5. Copy Client ID and Client Secret
